'''竏嘖-th-ch''' ('''kasathach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:eigendecompose|eigendecompose]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-th-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eigendecompose|eigendecompose]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嘖-th-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kasathach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisathach|thisathach]] || [[word:jisathach|jisathach]] || [[word:shisathach|shisathach]] || [[word:kisathach|kisathach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusathach|thuthusathach]] || [[word:jujusathach|jujusathach]] || [[word:shushusathach|shushusathach]] || [[word:kukusathach|kukusathach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusathach|thusathach]] || [[word:jusathach|jusathach]] || [[word:shusathach|shusathach]] || [[word:kusathach|kusathach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusathach|thusathach]] || [[word:jusathach|jusathach]] || [[word:shusathach|shusathach]] || [[word:kusathach|kusathach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesathach|thesathach]] || [[word:jesathach|jesathach]] || [[word:shesathach|shesathach]] || [[word:kesathach|kesathach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosathach|thothosathach]] || [[word:jojosathach|jojosathach]] || [[word:shoshosathach|shoshosathach]] || [[word:kokosathach|kokosathach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosathach|thosathach]] || [[word:josathach|josathach]] || [[word:shosathach|shosathach]] || [[word:kosathach|kosathach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosathach|thosathach]] || [[word:josathach|josathach]] || [[word:shosathach|shosathach]] || [[word:kosathach|kosathach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦsathach|thﾃｦsathach]] || [[word:jﾃｦsathach|jﾃｦsathach]] || [[word:shﾃｦsathach|shﾃｦsathach]] || [[word:kﾃｦsathach|kﾃｦsathach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasathach|thathasathach]] || [[word:jajasathach|jajasathach]] || [[word:shashasathach|shashasathach]] || [[word:kakasathach|kakasathach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasathach|thasathach]] || [[word:jasathach|jasathach]] || [[word:shasathach|shasathach]] || [[word:kasathach|kasathach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasathach|thasathach]] || [[word:jasathach|jasathach]] || [[word:shasathach|shasathach]] || [[word:kasathach|kasathach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasathach|shasathach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasathach|goshasathach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasathach|gokishasathach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasathachnﾃｼ|shasathachnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasathachnknﾃｼ|goshasathachnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasathachnﾃｼ|gokishasathachnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasathachshﾃｫ|shasathachshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasathachnkshﾃｫ|goshasathachnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasathachshﾃｫ|gokishasathachshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasathachro|shasathachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasathachnkro|goshasathachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasathachro|gokishasathachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasathachmu|shasathachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasathachnkmu|goshasathachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasathachmu|gokishasathachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasathachsher|shasathachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasathachnksher|goshasathachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasathachsher|gokishasathachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasathachng|shasathachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasathachnkng|goshasathachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasathachng|gokishasathachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasathachya|shasathachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasathachnkya|goshasathachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasathachya|gokishasathachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasathachyam|shasathachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasathachnkyam|goshasathachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasathachyam|gokishasathachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasathachnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shasathachnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasathachnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshasathachnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasathachnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishasathachnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasathachnﾃｼro|shasathachnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasathachnknﾃｼro|goshasathachnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasathachnﾃｼro|gokishasathachnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasathachnﾃｼmu|shasathachnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasathachnknﾃｼmu|goshasathachnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasathachnﾃｼmu|gokishasathachnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasathachshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shasathachshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasathachnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshasathachnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasathachshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishasathachshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasathachshﾃｫro|shasathachshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasathachnkshﾃｫro|goshasathachnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasathachshﾃｫro|gokishasathachshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasathachshﾃｫmu|shasathachshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasathachnkshﾃｫmu|goshasathachnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasathachshﾃｫmu|gokishasathachshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasathachronﾃｼ|shasathachronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasathachnkronﾃｼ|goshasathachnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasathachronﾃｼ|gokishasathachronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasathachroshﾃｫ|shasathachroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasathachnkroshﾃｫ|goshasathachnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasathachroshﾃｫ|gokishasathachroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasathachromu|shasathachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasathachnkromu|goshasathachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasathachromu|gokishasathachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasathachmunﾃｼ|shasathachmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasathachnkmunﾃｼ|goshasathachnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasathachmunﾃｼ|gokishasathachmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasathachmushﾃｫ|shasathachmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasathachnkmushﾃｫ|goshasathachnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasathachmushﾃｫ|gokishasathachmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasathachmuro|shasathachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasathachnkmuro|goshasathachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasathachmuro|gokishasathachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
